items.name_cn:
Exclusive real shot m11461 (Summer)
This Pochette Métis Xph bag captures the vibrant tones and lively spirit of Monogram Tiles canvas, embellished with the LV Circle logo above the S-lock clasp. The academic bag structure features a top handle and a detachable long shoulder strap, suitable for shoulder and crossbody wear.
Size: 25 x 19 x 7 cm

specs.rawTitle:
Exclusive real shot m11461 (Summer)
This Pochette Métis Xph bag captures the vibrant tones and lively spirit of Monogram Tiles canvas, embellished with the LV Circle logo above the S-lock clasp. The academic bag structure features a top handle and a detachable long shoulder strap, suitable for shoulder and crossbody wear.
Size: 25 x 19 x 7 cm

items.name_cn:
Exclusive photo M83621 Magenta (Summer 2024)
By the Pool Summer Series, condensing the Diane bag into a miniature version. Coated canvas features vibrant Monogram Tiles Xph pattern, overflowing with romantic Mediterranean flair. The rounded flap opens with a strap, and leather trim adds an elegant touch.
The gift box packaging included with this product may be reasonably adjusted based on stock availability and may differ from the style shown on this product page; please refer to the actual gift box packaging received.
Size: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

specs.rawTitle:

By the Pool Summer Series, condensing the Diane bag into a miniature version. Coated canvas features vibrant Monogram Tiles Xph pattern, overflowing with romantic Mediterranean flair. The rounded flap opens with a strap, and leather trim adds an elegant touch.

items.name_en: Exclusive real shot M25317 Red M11263 Blue (Summer 2024). Crafted with Monogram Tiles Xph canvas to create a tote bag silhouette, accented with leather trim outlining the top and handles. The central Circle logo complements the watercolor Monogram pattern, and the printed zip pouch can be removed for separate use.

items.name_en: Premium Original Leather M23955 M23947 Black Black Warrior (Gun Buckle)
items.name_cn:
Premium Original Leather M23955 M23947 Black Black Warrior (Gun Buckle)
Featuring exquisite calfskin and matte metal hardware to convey a modern attitude, this new horizontal design gathers classic elements from the same series. The KHl adjustable woven chain allows for shoulder or crossbody wear, making it a trendy choice for carrying essentials like a phone and card case.
Dimensions: 31.0 x 20.0 x 11.0
